zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Berkeley IV於1150年出生在蘇格蘭班福爾卡倫時，他的父親Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley82歲，母親Rissa Marie le Littleton77歲。他和Eva de Galloway至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1190年在蘇格蘭享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Berkeley IV于1150年出生在苏格兰班福爾卡倫时，他的父亲Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley82岁，母亲Rissa Marie le Littleton77岁。他和Eva de Galloway至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1190年在苏格兰享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Berkeley IV was born in 1150, in Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, his father, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, was 82 and his mother, Rissa Marie le Littleton, was 77. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Eva de Galloway. He died in 1190, in Scotland, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Berkeley IV est né en 1150, à Cullen, Banffshire, Écosse, son père, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, avait 82 ans et sa mère, Rissa Marie le Littleton, avait 77 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Eva de Galloway. Il est décédé en 1190, à Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Berkeley IV 1150 in Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley 82 und seine Mutter Rissa Marie le Littleton 77. Er hatte mit Eva de Galloway mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Berkeley IV è nato il nel 1150 nel Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, aveva 82 anni e il suo madre, Rissa Marie le Littleton, aveva 77 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Eva de Galloway. Morì nel 1190, nel Scotland, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Berkeley IVが1150年にスコットランドバンフシュアイアクウレンで生まれた時，父Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartleyは82歳，母Rissa Marie le Littletonは77歳であった。彼はEva de Gallowayとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1190年にスコットランドで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Berkeley IV(이)가 1150년 스컷랜드 반프실르 컬렌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley(은)는 82세였고, 그의 어머니 Rissa Marie le Littleton(은)는 77세였다. 그는 Eva de Galloway(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 스컷랜드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Gartley, Banffshire, Scotland: Gartly, Siorrachd Bhanbh, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Berkeley IV nasceu em 1150, em Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, seu pai, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, tinha 82 anos e sua mãe, Rissa Marie le Littleton, tinha 77 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Eva de Galloway. Ele faleceu em 1190, em Scotland, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Berkeley IV родился в 1150 г. в местности куллен, банффшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley было 82 года, а матери, которую звали Rissa Marie le Littleton, 77. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Eva de Galloway. Он умер в 1190 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Berkeley IV nació en 1150, en Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, su papá, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, tenía 82 años y su mamá, Rissa Marie le Littleton, tenía 77 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Eva de Galloway. Murió en 1190, en Scotland, a la edad de 40 años.
